case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. HENRY LUNA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,711.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNA, HENRY $2,711.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,861.00, $2711.00 FOR AMBULANCE SERVICE TO UCSF. INSURANCE COMPANY PAID DEFENDANT AND HE FAILED TO PAY HIS BILL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $150. SERVED JAN-24-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LUNA, HENRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINRD. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SARAH HEYWORTH, SENIOR COLLECTION'S OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2025 - JUDGMENT.
